differential_diagnoses: Endogenous Cushing's syndrome (adrenal adenoma vs ectopic ACTH)
next_steps: Perform cryptococcal antigen testing on CSF and serum
Send CSF for fungal culture, mycobacterial (AFB) culture and PCR, and cytology
Measure serum ACTH, serum cortisol, and 24-hour urine free cortisol
Initiate empiric antifungal therapy (amphotericin B plus flucytosine) given high clinical suspicion for cryptococcal meningitis
Consult neurosurgery for potential ventricular drain placement due to elevated intracranial pressure (opening pressure > 58 cm H2O)
Verify MRI compatibility of the vagus-nerve stimulator (VNS) for potential imaging, or proceed with CT-guided biopsy if intracranial lesions persist
